problem.title: Surrounded Regions
problem.description: Given an m x n matrix board containing 'X' and 'O', capture all regions that are 4-directionally surrounded by 'X'.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – DFS
solutions.description: Any 'O' reachable from a border cell cannot be captured, so a first DFS pass from every border 'O' marks those safe cells with a sentinel ('E'). After the traversal, all remaining 'O' cells are fully surrounded and get flipped to 'X', while sentinels are restored to 'O'. The key insight is inverting the problem: instead of finding captured regions directly, find the uncapturable ones first.
